summary: Comprehensive test suite covering cartesian product generation, include/exclude rules, max-parallel/fail-fast handling, and max-size validation. Strengths: well-organized describe blocks with clear naming; excellent end-to-end testing through act with exact value assertions (not just structural); proper fixtures and temp directory management; actionlint workflow validation; act-result.txt artifact generation; implicit testing of dedup logic through include tests. Gaps: CLI error paths partially untested (missing explicit tests for missing argument, unreadable file errors); edge cases underexplored (special characters, numeric vs string comparisons, very large matrices); act tests limited to 3 cases (though well-chosen). Marker extraction in act.test.ts (indexOf-based) is functional but could be more robust with dedicated parsing. Workflow YAML not provided, so output marker contracts (`MATRIX_JSON_LINE:`, `MATRIX_SUMMARY`) cannot be verified against actual implementation. Would catch most regressions in core logic and integration; minor brittleness in test harness itself.
